_comment: Standing AUTHORIZATIONS for phaedo_consult (§10.5): subject-authored rules that OVERRIDE the inferred signal. Force effects (escalate | require_human | decline | autoproceed) resolve the decision deterministically at confidence:1.0, deference:high; bias_cautious | bias_bold nudge one step. match: domains[] (substring, case-insensitive) · magnitude_min/max (low|medium|high) · reversible (true/false) · amount_gt (number; needs action_descriptor.amount). Portable: copy into the vault as phaedo_fingerprint.consult_policies, or point PHAEDO_CONSULT_POLICIES at this file to try them.

rules.note: Any irreversible spend over $5,000 goes to me for a live decision
Irreversible legal or contract actions always go to a human
Do not send autonomous external email on my behalf
Lean cautious on people / immigration matters
